input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

A green digital counter appears in the bottom right, increasing from "$ 2043.17" to "$ 2110.33" and finally "$ 2349.92" as hands hold the device steady.

[106-110] A man in a black suit jacket enters rapidly and locks a silver handcuff onto the seated man's wrist, beside a white wristband reading "I AM". [110-112] The suited man, wearing round glasses, smiles down from a low angle; the seated man looks at the camera seriously. [112-116] The suited man stands beside the desk holding the wrist as the seated man looks up. [116-118] The seated man holds a clear plastic card, looking right, near a dark blue dresser with gold handles.

[120-124] An individual in a white graphic shirt sits at a wooden desk beneath a red lamp, opens a drawer, then stands and exits right, leaving the desk with scattered papers and a notebook near a grey chair. [124-130] A circular graphic overlay depicting mountains, water, and crossed tools with a banner "ORO -Y- PLATA" fades in over the empty room. The view transitions to a solid blue background centering the seal. Text on the gold rim animates from "THE GREA" to "THE GREAT SEAL OF" and fully resolves to "THE GREAT SEAL OF THE STATE OF MONTANA" around the static landscape illustration.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A static collage displays university imagery. Top left shows a rust-colored sign reading "STUDENT UNIO." Top center features a plaque for "Missoula College The University of Montana Administration Building Erected 1968." Bottom left depicts a red brick building. Bottom right shows a sign for "Montana State University Northern Donaldson Hall Commons." A central logo reads "Montana University System." [2-4] The top-left panel pans upward on the "STUDENT" sign, revealing curved metal. Simultaneously, the bottom-right quadrant becomes heavily blurred. [4-6] The layout rearranges. Top left reveals a stone archway with carvings. Top right shows rusted metal letters. Bottom right displays a modern building with a dark roof and a "BITTERROOT" sign. [6-8] The collage transitions to four scenes around text "All About Credit." Top left shows a red brick building. Top right depicts an interior lobby with banners. Bottom left features a pond with reeds. Bottom right displays a bronze bison statue. [8-10] The layout shifts horizontally. The brick building moves top center, the bison shifts bottom center, and pink flowers appear bottom right. [10-12] The collage vanishes, replaced by a young man in a white t-shirt writing in a spiral notebook at a desk with a red lamp.

[12-18] A young man with short brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a black and blue design, sits at a desk writing in a spiral-bound notebook with a pen. A red desk lamp illuminates the workspace near a closed white door. He pauses to read the text in the open book.
[18-24] The camera shifts to an over-the-shoulder view as he picks up a dark blue envelope with a yellow strip reading "ANNUAL FEE". He tears open the white flap of the envelope while the textbook page titled "Large Datasets" lies open on the desk. He reaches inside to extract the contents.
[24-28] He pulls out a white document with a yellow header stating "THE AMEX EVERYDAY CREDIT CARD." Holding the paper in his left hand, he uses his right hand, which wears a white wristband with black lettering, to position a plastic sleeve containing a silver card against the document, examining the new credit card materials.

[30-34] A young man wearing a white graphic t-shirt sits indoors in front of a white door and dark blue dresser, holding a clear plastic card sleeve in his left hand and gazing intently at the card inside. [34-38] He looks upward and to the right, away from the object, as the camera loses focus, making the subject and the blue dresser extremely blurry and indistinct. [38-40] The heavily blurred view cuts to a black screen. [40-42] The video cuts to a sunny outdoor scene where the young man, now wearing sunglasses, walks forward while a man in a dark suit and tie follows in the background near distant mountains and buildings.

[28-30] A young man in a white t-shirt with a black and blue graphic sits indoors near a white door and blue dresser. [42-46] Outdoors, the young man, labeled "COLLEGE STUDENT," wears sunglasses and eats a foil-wrapped item while a man in a black suit walks forward in the background. [46-50] The background man, labeled "CREDIT COMPANY," smiles and gives two thumbs up as a green counter showing "$ 0000.00" appears. [50-54] The counter updates to "$ 0006.79" as the student exits the frame right. The counter vanishes, and the suited man lowers his hands to his sides.

From [54-56], a man in a black suit, white shirt, and glasses stands smiling outdoors with mountains behind him as the camera loses focus. [56-64] The video cuts to a young man in a white t-shirt and sunglasses drinking from a cup with a green straw. The man in the suit reappears behind him, smiling and raising his hands near his face. A green digital counter appears reading '$ 0008.71' and updates to '$ 0011.54'. [64-70] The scene changes to a low-angle view of a person in a white t-shirt and khaki cargo shorts walking away on a sidewalk. They carry black and white shopping bags in their left hand, passing a red brick wall and hanging flower baskets near a building entrance.

[72-74] The individual in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts exits the frame to the left. The view remains on the red brick wall and concrete sidewalk. To the right, a hanging flower basket and the glass entrance of a building are visible in the background.

A person in a white t-shirt, khaki shorts, and sunglasses walks from the right edge toward the left, carrying a shopping bag, while the counter updates to "$ 0419.58".

[76-78] A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks left along a sidewalk beside a brick wall, carrying a shopping bag. A green digital counter in the bottom right corner increases from $0419.58 to $0476.30.

In the bottom right corner, a green digital counter displaying a dollar amount increases from $0476.30 to $0534.82 as the individual progresses across the frame.

[80-82] A person in a white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks left along a brick wall. Behind them, a man in a black suit jumps into the frame from the right with arms raised. A green digital counter in the bottom right corner rapidly increases from $0534.82 to $0649.38.

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: The video features a young man with short brown hair wearing a white t-shirt with a black and blue graphic design. He is seated at a desk in a room with a white door and dark blue dresser. Initially looking down, he lifts a small, clear plastic object to eye level with his left hand. He then holds a clear plastic card sleeve containing a card, examining it closely with a focused expression while remaining seated.

samples.output: <think>The person in the white t-shirt and khaki shorts walks left, nearly leaving the frame. The man in the black suit runs energetically behind them in the same direction. A green digital counter in the bottom left corner updates rapidly, showing a dollar amount increasing to approximately $0821.58.</think><answer></answer>
